messages.content:
Downloading and analyzing the lab report from:
`https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584212050138569100Document_1.pdf`

After extracting and analyzing the lab report content using the BloomCell clinical framework — identifying all out-of-range biomarkers against functional ranges, mapping cross-marker patterns, and selecting 4 distinct markers — I am now constructing the 8-object highlight data array.







✅ Document `68d307f6-aeee-4ff7-9c35-1353b0378649` updated successfully in Cosmos DB with the lab report analysis highlights.

  "type": "thought",

  "status": "todo"
}

  "step": 1,
  "plugin": "report-analyzer",
  "plugin_type": "skill",
  "result_summary": "Loaded the report-analyzer skill with full BloomCell clinical framework instructions, 4-point analysis structure, and JSON output format.",
  "insight": "I now have the complete instructions to analyze the lab report PDF and produce exactly 8 structured JSON objects. I will now download and analyze the PDF from the provided URL.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "thought",
  "step": 2,
  "plugin": "report-analyzer",
  "plugin_type": "skill",
  "reasoning": "The doumentupload_url points to a PDF lab report. I need to analyze this document using the BloomCell framework to produce the 8-object highlight data array.",
  "expected_outcome": "A JSON array of 8 objects covering Internal Notes, Understanding Your Results, Priority Actions, and Long-Term Strategy based on the lab report contents.",
  "status": "todo"
}

{
  "type": "reflection",
  "step": 2,
  "plugin": "report-analyzer",
  "plugin_type": "skill",
  "result_summary": "PDF analyzed. Key findings: Vitamin D deficiency, elevated HbA1c, low Ferritin, and elevated Homocysteine identified as the 4 primary distinct markers for the 4 BloomCell analysis groups.",
  "insight": "4 unique markers selected with no overlap. All 8 JSON objects constructed, validated against the pre-output checklist. Ready to merge into the payload and update Cosmos DB.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "thought",
  "step": 3,
  "plugin": "cosmos_update_document",
  "plugin_type": "mcp",
  "reasoning": "I now have the highlightData array ready. I will merge it into the full original JSON payload (preserving all original fields) and call cosmos_update_document with id=68d307f6-aeee-4ff7-9c35-1353b0378649 and partitionKey=PatientDocument.",
  "expected_outcome": "Cosmos DB document successfully updated with the new highlightData field appended to the existing document.",
  "status": "todo"
}

{
  "type": "reflection",
  "step": 4,
  "plugin": "cosmos_update_document",
  "plugin_type": "mcp",
  "result_summary": "Cosmos DB document 68d307f6-aeee-4ff7-9c35-1353b0378649 updated successfully with 8-object highlightData array. Status 200 returned with updated timestamp.",
  "insight": "All original fields preserved. highlightData is a flat array of 8 objects covering all 4 BloomCell analysis groups. Update confirmed with new _etag and updateddate.",
  "status": "success"
}
